description: Phase 0 reference set — 10 sites chosen to span different design aesthetics. Goal: validate that the extractor produces useful DNA across the range, not that any single site is 'the best'.

sites.note: Modern minimal SaaS — clean scale, restrained palette, subtle motion.
Sophisticated developer marketing — gradients, detailed scroll work.
Minimalist monochrome, sharp typography, large type.
Motion-heavy, illustrative — lots of CSS animation.
Personal site, strong editorial + motion vocabulary.
Editorial tech — serif/sans mix, warm palette.
Premium product marketing — SF type stack, large imagery.
